label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 8

extraction.one_line_summary: VINE Jay won his second stage attacking from a quality 10-man breakaway on the final Cat 1 climb, while EVENEPOEL survived GC attacks without losing time to MAS or ROGLIC
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL burned entire Quick-Step team early on multiple climbs before final Cat 1, revealing vulnerability under sustained pressure.
VINE prioritized polka dot jersey on intermediate climbs before committing to stage win with 5km remaining.
INEOS installed three riders in 10-man break while Quick-Step had zero representation, asymmetric resource deployment.
MAS, ROGLIC, EVENEPOEL finished together despite attacks, suggesting hesitation to commit before rest day Stage 10.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: required full team support unusually early and visibly struggled to follow GC rivals despite no time loss
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: dominated every categorized climb before stage win, making polka dot jersey competition unassailable
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: worked hard to bridge to break via ARMIRAIL then finished strong, commentary noted 'refound mojo'
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: took green jersey by infiltrating mountainous breakaway, sprinting intermediate points despite being non-sprinter
rider_signals.LOPEZ Juan Ayuso: positive: commentary specifically noted legs 'woke up' after disappointing early stages
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: negative: dropped from quality breakaway before final climb despite being climbing specialist
